description: REQ-TAG-009 states the tag filter list is rendered 'in the left sidebar (above or integrated with the feed list)'. The phrase 'above or integrated with' is ambiguous and leaves a critical layout decision unspecified. The existing codebase has FeedList.svelte as a self-contained component rendering a .feed-list div. The spec does not clarify whether: (a) TagFilterSidebar is a sibling component rendered alongside FeedList by a parent layout, (b) TagFilterSidebar is rendered inside FeedList.svelte above the feed rows, or (c) TagFilterSidebar is a completely separate left-panel component. This ambiguity affects component ownership, props/dependency flow, and test architecture.

evidence.snippet: THE SYSTEM SHALL render a tag filter list in the left sidebar (above or integrated with the feed list)
